summary: Iteration 39: Tested all 6 bug fixes. All features working correctly - Rich Text Editor alignment, Reading List block modal, Page deletion persistence, Blog categories CRUD with dropdown, Gallery categories A→Z sorting, Homepage news slug links.
critical_code_review_comments: RichTextEditor.js: Quill toolbar now includes { align: [] } for text alignment (left/center/right/justify)
BlockRenderer.js: ReadingListBlock now includes BookDetailModal component with click-to-open functionality
BlockRenderer.js: BookDetailModal displays title, author, description, synopsis, who_is_it_for, about_author, and Amazon link
PagesManager.js: useEffect on mount only calls load() - seedSystemPages() removed, fixing page deletion persistence
BlogManager.js: Categories button opens CRUD dialog with A→Z sorted categories
BlogManager.js: Post edit dialog uses select dropdown for Category populated from blog_categories collection
admin_content.py: GET /api/admin/blog-categories returns categories sorted by name A→Z
admin_content.py: GET /api/admin/gallery-categories returns categories sorted by name A→Z
public.py: GET /api/public/gallery-categories returns categories sorted by name A→Z
HomePage.js: News section links use p.slug || p.id for URL construction
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 bug fixes verified: (1) Rich Text Editor has alignment buttons in Quill toolbar. (2) Reading List block on dynamic pages (/reading-list-new) shows BookDetailModal when clicking a book - displays title, author, description, synopsis, who_is_it_for, about_author, Amazon link. (3) PagesManager no longer calls seedSystemPages on mount - deleted pages stay deleted. (4) Blog Manager has Categories button opening CRUD dialog, post edit uses select dropdown with categories from blog_categories collection. (5) Gallery and blog categories both sorted A→Z by name. (6) Homepage news links use slug format (/news/slug-here) not UUID.

rich_text_editor_alignment.details: Quill toolbar includes alignment picker (.ql-align) for left/center/right/justify

reading_list_block_modal.details: BookDetailModal opens on book click, shows title, author, synopsis, who_is_it_for, about_author, Amazon link

page_deletion_persistence.details: PagesManager useEffect only calls load(), seedSystemPages removed from mount

blog_categories_crud.details: Categories button opens dialog with Business, Strategy, Technology sorted A→Z

blog_category_dropdown.details: Post edit dialog shows select dropdown with categories from blog_categories collection

blog_categories_sorted_az.details: GET /api/admin/blog-categories returns categories sorted by name A→Z

gallery_categories_sorted_az.details: Both admin and public gallery-categories endpoints return categories sorted A→Z (Business, Main, Solution2, Travels)

news_detail_navigation.details: Clicking news post navigates to correct detail page with slug URL
